### 🚀 New FIMS Repositories Discovered!

The monthly discovery action found the following repositories using FIMS that do not have a `fims-metadata.yml` file.

**Repository:** [NOAA-FIMS/FIMS](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMS)
**Owner/Commiter:** @NOAA-FIMS
**Location:** Unknown
**FIMS Version:** Unknown (Not specified in renv.lock)
**Description:** The repository for development of FIMS

---
**Repository:** [jimianelli/ebswp_fims](https://github.com/jimianelli/ebswp_fims)
**Owner/Commiter:** @jimianelli
**Location:** Unknown
**FIMS Version:** Unknown (Not specified in renv.lock)
**Description:** DRAFT testing of FIMS

---
**Repository:** [NOAA-FIMS/FIMSdiags](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMSdiags)
**Owner/Commiter:** @NOAA-FIMS
**Location:** Unknown
**FIMS Version:** 0.9.2
**Description:** R package to run model diagnostics on FIMS models

---
**Repository:** [NOAA-FIMS/case-studies](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/case-studies)
**Owner/Commiter:** @NOAA-FIMS
**Location:** Unknown
**FIMS Version:** Unknown (Not specified in renv.lock)
**Description:** FIMS case studies after MQ

---
**Repository:** [NOAA-FIMS/fims-gcp-workstations](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/fims-gcp-workstations)
**Owner/Commiter:** @NOAA-FIMS
**Location:** Unknown
**FIMS Version:** Unknown (Not specified in renv.lock)
**Description:** Example configuration and deployment of Google Cloud Workstations for the FIMS project

---
**Repository:** [MOshima-PIFSC/Opaka-FIMS-Case-Study](https://github.com/MOshima-PIFSC/Opaka-FIMS-Case-Study)
**Owner/Commiter:** @MOshima-PIFSC
**Location:** Honolulu, HI
**FIMS Version:** Unknown (Not specified in renv.lock)
**Description:** A FIMS case study using the Opakapaka SS3 model 

---
**Repository:** [NOAA-FIMS/presentations](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/presentations)
**Owner/Commiter:** @NOAA-FIMS
**Location:** Unknown
**FIMS Version:** Unknown (Not specified in renv.lock)
**Description:** A repository for National Stock Assessment Program presentations

---
**Repository:** [NOAA-FIMS/Age_Structured_Stock_Assessment_Model_Comparison](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/Age_Structured_Stock_Assessment_Model_Comparison)
**Owner/Commiter:** @NOAA-FIMS
**Location:** Unknown
**FIMS Version:** Unknown (Not specified in renv.lock)
**Description:** This repo is a read-only archive of the age structured stock assessment model comparison project code. The repo has been migrated to NOAA-FIMS
